title: Berlin Pools Guide 2026 - Quick Summary
items: Berlin runs **~60 public pools** — beautiful, cheap, and bewildering to first-time visitors.
**Do the ticket-and-crowd check before leaving the hotel.** Outdoor-pool tickets and current capacity signals matter on hot weekends.
Tickets are **time-based** (90 min / 150 min / full day) and **category-based** (1, 2, or 3 by amenity level).
**Choose pools for predictability:** lockers, showers, lifeguards, children’s areas and a clearer time slot. Choose lakes when the journey and picnic are part of the day.
**Stadtbad Neukölln** (1914) is the most beautiful public pool in Berlin — possibly Germany.
